[PUBLISHED DATE]: Unknown Date
[TITLE]: What's on the Thanksgiving menu at the White House? - CBS News
[METADATA/INTRO]: What's on the Thanksgiving menu at the White House? President Obama and the first family will enjoy a Thanksgiving feast on Thursday with no fewer than six pies for dessert....
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Before dinner, President Obama called U.S. troops stationed around the world. 
 A day earlier, the first family served Thanksgiving Dinner at Friendship Place, an organization dedicated to serving the local homeless population. Mr. Obama served turkey and gravy, while his older daughter Malia stood next to him and served mashed and sweet potatoes. First Lady Michelle Obama served vegetables, and younger daugther Sasha served cranberries and stuffing.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2011-03-27
[TITLE]: When the Obamas go out for dinner ... | Barack Obama | The Guardian
[METADATA/INTRO]: What happens when the president of the United States fancies going out for a meal? He brings a lot more burly men in black suits than our prime minister. According to the Washington Post, when the first family visit a...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: What happens when the president of the United States fancies going out for a meal? He brings a lot more burly men in black suits than our prime minister. According to the Washington Post, when the first family visit a restaurant, they eat quietly, say hello to the chef and leave a "nice, but not crazy, tip". It's the Secret Service who really go to town. 
 Preparations begin several hours before; a small detail conducts a walk-through with the restaurant manager and choose tables for the first family. An hour before the arrival of the president, 20 to 30 agents take up positions all over the building. At the front door, they wield electronic wands, scanning the evening's other diners for hidden weapons. In the kitchen, a Secret Service agent, who is also a trained chef, watches over the restaurant staff's every move.

[METADATA/INTRO]: new video loaded: Obama family serves homeless veterans on Thanksgiving eve transcript...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: new video loaded: Obama family serves homeless veterans on Thanksgiving eve 
 Obama family serves homeless veterans on Thanksgiving eve 
 U.S. President Barack Obama and the First Family serve a Thanksgiving feast to homeless veterans in Washington, D.C. Rough Cut (no reporter narration). 
 ROUGH CUT (NO REPORTER NARRATION) STORY: The First Family of the United States on Wednesday (November 25) served Thanksgiving dinner to homeless veterans at a church in Washington, D.C. U.S. President Barack Obama, his daughters Malia and Sasha, wife Michelle, and mother-in-law Marian Robinson served up traditional Thanksgiving food, with the president dishing out turkey with one hand and pouring gravy from a ladle in the other hand. The dinner, “Feast with Friends“, was put on by the Friendship Place program at St. Luke’s Methodist Church in Northwest Washington, which helps homeless and at-risk veterans.
